channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Woman accusing Jay-Z and Sean 'Diddy' Combs of sexual assault acknowledges inconsistencies
item.description: A woman who accused rappers Jay-Z and Sean “Diddy” Combs of sexually assaulting her when she was 13 at an awards show after-party has acknowledged certain inconsistencies in her story, while her lawyer said he will continue to vet her claims.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Detroit area's many Syrians are celebrating Assad's overthrow and planning long-delayed visits
item.description: DEARBORN, Mich. (AP) — Nizam Abazid is gleefully planning his first trip in decades to Syria, where he grew up. Rama Alhoussaini was only 6 years old when her family moved to the U.S., but she's excited about the prospect of introducing her three kids to relatives they've never met in person.
item.dc:creator: COREY WILLIAMS and MIKE HOUSEHOLDER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KTLA 5

item.title: Memphis man guilty of killing wife during Fiji honeymoon
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- A court in Fiji has convicted a Memphis man for the murder of his wife during their honeymoon in the island country more than two years ago, the victim's family confirmed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: US military flies American released from Syrian prison to Jordan, officials say
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. military has transported out of Syria an American who had disappeared seven months ago into former President Bashar Assad’s notorious prison system and was among the thousands released this week by rebels, U.S. officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Health insurance stocks have fallen since UnitedHealthcare CEO killing
item.description: Major health insurance carriers have seen their stocks tumble amid outrage with the nation's health care industry.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Capitol rioter who tried to join Russian army is sentenced to prison for probation violation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A Dallas man who tried to fly overseas to join the Russian military and fight against Ukraine was sentenced on Friday to six months in prison for violating the terms of his probation for storming the U.S. Capitol four years ago. Kevin Loftus, a 56-year-old veteran of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Drones, planes or UFOs? Americans abuzz over mysterious New Jersey sightings
item.description: It’s unclear if that buzzing sound coming out of New Jersey is drones or something else, but for sure the nighttime sightings are producing tons of talk, a raft of conspiracy theories and craned necks looking skyward.
item.dc:creator: Mike Catalini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Catholic charitable group's plea to be free from Wisconsin unemployment tax
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday said it would take up a new religious rights case over whether a Catholic charitable organization must pay Wisconsin's employment tax.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nephew's Christmas revelation leads to cold-case killer's prison sentence
item.description: A convicted killer who had escaped justice for more than a decade learned Thursday that he will likely spend the rest of his life in prison.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hayes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New Jersey governor wants more federal resources for probe into drone sightings
item.description: TOMS RIVER, N.J. (AP) — Gov. Phil Murphy has asked the Biden administration to put more resources into an investigation of mysterious drone sightings that have been reported in New Jersey and nearby states.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A man has pleaded guilty to the death of a 5-year-old girl living in their Kansas homeless camp
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A man who lived in a makeshift camp with a homeless 5-year-old Kansas girl and her father pleaded guilty Friday to first-degree murder and rape in connection with the child’s death.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Two states sue Glock over add-on allowing machine gun-like firing
item.description: Officials in New Jersey and Minnesota filed a lawsuit against gun manufacturer Glock Thursday, demanding the company suspend its sale of weapons that can be easily converted with a switch to allow over 1,000 rounds of rapid fire.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Conan O'Brien's parents die within days of each other
item.description: Dr. Thomas O’Brien and Ruth R. O’Brien, the parents of late-night icon Conan O’Brien, both passed away within days of each other at their home in Brookline, Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Duke lacrosse players' rape accuser admits she lied
item.description: A woman who accused three former Duke University men’s lacrosse players of rape nearly two decades ago admitted she lied about the allegations and asked them for forgiveness.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Missouri man Travis Timmerman, missing since June, freed from Syrian prison
item.description: A Missouri man found in Syria said early Friday he was freed following the overthrow of Syrian President Bashar Assad after seven months in prison.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Hammer, Fox 5

item.title: Justice Department, Louisville reach deal after probe prompted by Breonna Taylor killing
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — The U.S. Justice Department and the city of Louisville have reached an agreement to reform the city’s police force after an investigation prompted by the fatal police shooting of Breonna Taylor and police treatment of protesters, officials said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Drone operators worry that anxiety over mystery sightings will lead to new restrictions
item.description: Drones for commercial and recreational use have grown rapidly in popularity, despite restrictions on who can operate them and where they can be flown.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KOENIG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Police say suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing wasn't a client of the insurer
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The man charged with killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson was not a client of the medical insurer and may have targeted it because of its size and influence, a senior police official said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Traces of fentanyl were found inside bottlenose dolphins that were found dead in the Gulf of Mexico, raising concerns that the deadly drug may be affecting other sea life.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KRON4

item.title: Box truck loses control, hits fire truck on Michigan highway, video shows
item.description: No first responders were hurt, but the driver of the box truck was taken to the hospital with minor injuries.
item.dc:creator: Katie Rosendale, Fox 5

item.title: WarnerBros. Discovery announces major corporate restructure
item.description: Media conglomerate WarnerBros. Discovery (WBD) announced a major restructuring of its business on Thursday, splitting its linear and streaming arms into two separate companies as it eyes potential mergers and acquisitions in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Dick Van Dyke, Cher among those forced to flee Malibu homes in wake of wildfire
item.description: Officials said the fire, which grew significantly overnight, was only 7% contained as of Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, ABC 4

item.title: Turning dusty attic treasures into cash can yield millions for some and disappointment for others
item.description: THOMASTON, Maine (AP) — Kaja Veilleux has been hunting New England attic treasures for more than 50 years.
item.dc:creator: NICK PERRY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, Fox 5

item.title: Luxury real estate brokers charged in federal indictment with sex trafficking in NYC
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two luxury real estate brokers and their brother have been charged with luring, drugging and violently raping dozens of women over more than a decade, according to a federal indictment unsealed Wednesday in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Key details about the man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare's CEO
item.description: The man accused of killing the head of one of the biggest U.S. health insurance companies is fighting being sent to face charges in New York City, where the attack happened.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE and SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Will TikTok be banned in January? Here's where things stand as deadline nears
item.description: You may not be able to doomscroll on TikTok much longer unless the social media company finds a way to stop a new law from going into effect.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: The Amazing Kreskin, renowned mentalist and frequent late-night guest, dies at 89
item.description: The Amazing Kreskin, an entertainer and mentalist who rose to fame amid frequent appearances on TV talk shows like “The Tonight Show” and “The Mike Douglas Show,” has died, his family confirmed on social media. He was 89 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dead dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Drug smugglers using open waterways to move products may be affecting the health of sea life in the Gulf of Mexico
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Luigi Mangione was reported missing 2 weeks before CEO slain: police
item.description: The parents of Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of shooting and killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, told law enforcement that they hadn't heard from their son in months.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Nicole Johnson, ABC 4

item.title: GOP senators say they won’t fight Trump on Jan. 6 pardons
item.description: Republican senators who witnessed firsthand the Jan. 6, 2021, ransacking of congressional offices now say it’s up to President-elect Donald Trump whether to pardon those protesters convicted of federal crimes.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Rocky Colavito, 9-time All-Star outfielder and one of Cleveland's most popular athletes, dies at 91
item.description: Rocky Colavito, a wildly popular outfielder who was involved in one of the most debated trades in Cleveland sports history, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC
